title: Garlicky Roasted Syrian Turkey Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring roasted turkey, garlic, and creamy ingredients, served in a traditional Syrian clay pot
instructions: In a mortar and pestle, pound the garlic cloves until they are well-crushed.
In a large clay pot, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turkey breast to the pot and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast the turkey for 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the heavy cream and crushed garlic.
Return the pot to the oven and roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and garnish with fresh parsley.
Serve the turkey hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
